stemHtml: On a cold winter day with an OAT of -8°C you are under radar vectors. You (1) _____ within the coverage of a navigation aid to verify your position. The altitude assigned by ATC (2) _____.

options.a: (1) can expect to be; (2) is temperature corrected
options.b: (1) should not expect to be; (2) is not temperature corrected
options.c: (1) can expect to be; (2) is not temperature corrected
options.d: (1) should not expect to be; (2) is temperature corrected
